title: Pael's Eye
description: The first time each combat you end your turn without playing cards, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold], and take an extra turn.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Triggers when you end your turn without playing any cards. Once triggered per combat, it exhausts your entire hand and grants an extra turn. The relic is reset after combat ends.
